_raw_tail: erator should pivot away from percentile/historical-rank fields (listing_age_days, marketcap_bucket, *_pct_top_decile) until they are explicitly added to SUPPORTED_FIELDS with point-in-time semantics; instead explore signed-threshold combinations on already-supported continuous fields (funding direction, premium_bps direction, day_change_pct deciles) and exit-side archetypes — only 1 of 3 LLM-accepted Round 1 archetypes was an exit and the X101+ series is starved relative to the entry pipeline."
